heading: No effect on other laws
label: 21145 No effect on other laws

children.heading: No effect on preclearance or other requirements under Voting Rights Act
children.label: b No effect on preclearance or other requirements under Voting Rights Act
children.text: The approval by the Administrator or the Commission of a payment or grant application under subchapter I or subchapter II, or any other action taken by the Commission or a State under such subchapter, shall not be considered to have any effect on requirements for preclearance under section 5 of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 () [now ] or any other requirements of such Act [ et seq.].42 U.S.C. 1973c52 U.S.C. 1030452 U.S.C. 10301
